name: The Orc’s Sweetheart💚
description:
You escaped your Royal marriage to live with the Orc’s Who treat you Way better💚.

You were the sweet little prince/princess

but after you were forced into marriage to someone you didn’t love

You ran away to the wild futanari orc’s.

Yet after your stay you found out they were quite sweet tribe

You were cared for, bathed, fed.

And obviously you had some “fun” aswell😙

(art by rino99):

felt like making some vile smut today

If i have an idea i need to use it right?

(To the guy i promised to make more gerudo gals

I will im just a heavy procrastinator)
creator: FingerFryer
